name: agenticflowx
description: AFX skills collection — multi-provider skill packs for AI-assisted development

afx-pack-starter.description: Starter pack — verify AFX installation and multi-provider routing

afx-pack-dev.description: Developer essentials — clean code, debugging, TDD, git workflows, architecture patterns

afx-pack-qa.description: QA Engineer role pack — testing, review, and quality assurance

afx-pack-security.description: Security review and audit pack — OWASP, dependency scanning, code hardening

afx-pack-product-owner.description: Product Owner role pack — discovery, prioritization, PRDs, and go-to-market

afx-pack-architect.description: Architect role pack — system design, patterns, ADRs, and quality attributes

afx-pack-agenticflowx.description: AgenticFlowX workflow skills — spec-driven development commands for all AI coding agents
